## Project Details
- **Project Type**: Next.js 14.2+ Web Application
- **Framework**: React 18.2 with TypeScript
- **Styling**: CSS with Tailwind CSS ready
- **Router**: App Router
- **Purpose**: Modern conversion of Abhima Group premium design agency HTML website

## Key Files Created
- `app/layout.tsx` - Root layout with metadata
- `app/page.tsx` - Main homepage
- `app/globals.css` - Global styles
- `components/Header.tsx` - Navigation with scroll detection
- `components/Hero.tsx` - Hero section
- `components/About.tsx` - About section
- `components/News.tsx` - News/Entities cards
- `components/Contact.tsx` - Contact information
- `components/Footer.tsx` - Footer
- `next.config.js` - Next.js configuration
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts
- `README.md` - Complete documentation

✅ Successfully compiled without errors

## Getting Started

### Development
```bash
cd c:\Users\dell\Downloads\abhimagroup-nextjs
npm run dev
```
Server runs at http://localhost:3000

### Production Build
```bash
npm run build
npm start
```

## Next Steps
1. Run `npm run dev` to start the development server
2. Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser
3. Test all sections (Hero, About, News, Contact)
4. (Optional) Replace placeholder images with optimized versions
5. (Optional) Add Image optimization using Next.js Image component
